task_completion.description: Create the network_security_config.xml file in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Android Studio project explorer or editor tab showing a new file named 'network_security_config.xml' located in 'app/src/main/res/xml/'.

task_completion.description: Disable cleartext traffic globally but allow it for the development domain 10.0.2.2
task_completion.visual_evidence: The XML file contains a <base-config cleartextTrafficPermitted="false"> tag (or similar global restriction) and a <domain-config cleartextTrafficPermitted="true"> tag specifically containing <domain includeSubdomains="true">10.0.2.2</domain> (or includeSubdomains="false").

task_completion.description: Implement certificate pinning for api.weatherstack.com with the specified expiration and pins
task_completion.visual_evidence: A <domain-config> tag containing <domain includeSubdomains="true">api.weatherstack.com</domain>. Inside it, a <pin-set expiration="2025-12-31"> containing two <pin digest="SHA-256"> tags with the exact values 'wJMSn8tj/kCPBXNRsKPJFJvfMM1bFBvLFHlRFiEPbdI=' and 'x9SZw6TwIqfmVLRDEmFi2yJTMlfn0CfVB3as3wSckOM='.

task_completion.description: Include debug overrides to trust user-added CA certificates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The XML file contains a <debug-overrides> section with a <trust-anchors> tag containing <certificates src="user" />.

task_completion.description: Update AndroidManifest.xml to reference the network security configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AndroidManifest.xml file is open and the <application> tag includes the attribute android:networkSecurityConfig="@xml/network_security_config".

task_completion.description: Ensure the Android project builds successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: Android Studio's Build tool window showing a 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message or a green checkmark indicating the Gradle build completed without errors after the changes were made.

integrity.description: Agent used Android Studio or a proper text editor to modify the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Android Studio code editor to make the XML changes, rather than just echoing text into files via the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent actually executed the Gradle build process
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output window shows a genuine execution log (e.g., executing tasks, resolving dependencies) rather than a mocked or skipped output.

integrity.description: Agent constructed the XML configuration rather than copying a pre-existing completed file from outside the workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing, copying specific values from the prompt, or using IDE auto-completion to build the XML structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp. The network security config must be placed exactly at app/src/main/res/xml/network_security_config.xml and referenced in app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml. The expected domains are api.weatherstack.com and 10.0.2.2. Note: Even if the real-world certificates for api.weatherstack.com have changed, the agent MUST use the exact expiration date (2025-12-31) and SHA-256 pins provided in the task description to receive points.
